span_mappings.nl_span: The cardinality of the union of two finite sets is at most the sum of their cardinalities

formal_statement: theorem qa_mathlib15_finset_card_union_le {α : Type u} [DecidableEq α] (s t : Finset α) : (s ∪ t).card ≤ s.card + t.card
natural_language_claim: The cardinality of the union of two finite sets is at most the sum of their cardinalities.
